title: ERROR: Missing timing data for module '$input_port'.
body:
### Version

Yosys 0.57+157 (git sha1 e546f3b8f, g++ 13.3.0-6ubuntu2~24.04 -fPIC -O3)

### On which OS did this happen?

Linux

### Reproduction Steps

Extract this tar.

[synth_gcd_nangate45_base_2025-09-23_11-16.tar.gz](https://github.com/user-attachments/files/22483334/synth_gcd_nangate45_base_2025-09-23_11-16.tar.gz)

./run-me-gcd-nangate45-base.sh

### Expected Behavior

No ERROR.

### Actual Behavior

...
ABC: <abc-temp-dir>/input : i/o =     34/     17  and =     386  lev =   16 (13.06)  mem = 0.01 MB  ch =   59  box = 0  bb = 0
ABC: + &write -n <abc-temp-dir>/output.aig 
ABC: + time 
ABC: elapse: 0.06 seconds, total: 0.06 seconds
Warning: Feature 'read_xaiger2' is experimental.

16.4.6. Executing XAIGER2 frontend.
Read 125 instances with cell library of size 30.
input file: 
input file: 
input file: This file was produced by the GIA package in ABC on Tue Sep 23 11:53:08 2025
input file: For information about AIGER format, refer to http://fmv.jku.at/aiger
<suppressed ~184 debug messages>

16.4.7. Executing ABC9_OPS pass (helper functions for ABC9).

16.5. Executing PORTARCS pass. (derive propagation arcs)
**ERROR: Missing timing data for module '$input_port'.**
